elements.name: Cant create an account with a repeat CBU

The operation should be denied due to repeat alias

elements.name: Successfully transfer money

I transfer 200.0 to the alias "bye14"
The first account balance should be 800.0 and the second account balance should be 1200.0

elements.name: Cannot transfer a negative amount

I try to transfer -100.0 to the alias "bye14"
The operation should be denied due to negative amount
The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0

elements.name: Cannot transfer more money than available balance

I try to transfer 1100.0 to the alias "bye14"
The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds
The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0
